surface_verification.justification: Server-only defect fix (input-boundary path normalisation). No client/UI/contract change. Verified end-to-end via the server HTTP integration test (routes.test.ts drives the real POST /tasks -> POST /launch flow and asserts the emitted posix cd is single-quoted, reproducing the reported macOS bug byte-for-byte) plus normalize-fs-path unit tests and projects-route tests; full server suite 1698/1698 green.

behaviors.behavior: task cwd wrapped in a surrounding single-quote pair is normalised so /launch emits `cd '<path>' &&`, not the double-escaped `cd ''''<path>'''' &&`
behaviors.evidence: routes.launch-cwd-quote.test.ts::emits a single-quoted cd, not the double-escaped form PASSED (reproduces the exact macOS command byte-for-byte)

behaviors.behavior: normalizeFsPath strips a surrounding single-quote pair
behaviors.evidence: normalize-fs-path.test.ts::strips a surrounding single-quote pair PASSED

behaviors.behavior: normalizeFsPath strips a surrounding double-quote pair (Windows paste)
behaviors.evidence: normalize-fs-path.test.ts::strips a surrounding double-quote pair PASSED

behaviors.behavior: normalizeFsPath leaves unquoted / lone-quote / mismatched-quote paths untouched (no corruption)
behaviors.evidence: normalize-fs-path.test.ts::leaves an unquoted path untouched / does NOT strip a lone leading or trailing quote / does not strip mismatched quote types PASSED

behaviors.behavior: empty / quotes-only value collapses to '' and task-create then falls back to process.cwd()
behaviors.evidence: normalize-fs-path.test.ts::collapses an empty / quotes-only value to the empty string PASSED (create.ts `rawCwd || process.cwd()` fallback)

behaviors.behavior: POST /api/projects normalises path before the existsSync/mkdir probes and create()
behaviors.evidence: projects.test.ts::POST /api/projects strips a surrounding quote pair before fs probes + create PASSED
projects.test.ts::PATCH /api/projects/:id strips a surrounding quote pair from path PASSED
